description_long: This is a classic wooden armchair with a curved backrest and elegantly carved details on the side and back panels. The seat is broad and slightly contoured for comfort, while the armrests are thick and smoothly rounded, connecting to turned vertical spindles that add a decorative touch. The backrest features a solid central panel flanked by two sets of spindles, and the lower back includes an ornate cut-out design. The legs are sturdy and slightly curved, providing stability and a traditional aesthetic. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the chair a warm, natural appearance. This chair would be well-suited for use in a park, public square, or other urban seating area.
description: A classic wooden armchair with a curved backrest, ornate carved details, and sturdy, rounded armrests. The visible wood grain and decorative spindles give it a traditional, elegant look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad seat, curved backrest, and thick, rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ornate carved panel and turned spindles along the armrest and back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wood backrest and the decorative cut-out design at the lower back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the armrest, spindles, and carved panel.
